title: ML for predicting molecular abundances in the interstellar medium
description: Master's thesis focused on applying **machine learning** to predict the detectability and abundance of complex molecules in the interstellar medium. Implementation of an approach inspired by **natural language processing (NLP)**, representing molecules as embedding vectors analogous to word2vec, along with **UMAP + HDBSCAN** clustering techniques and **Random Forest** classification models over an astrochemical molecular corpus.

title: Urban mobility analysis — TEC de Monterrey
description: Development of reproducible metrics and **pipelines** to analyze urban mobility patterns and estimate emissions in Mexican cities from GPS data, comparing behavior on mass-event days versus normal days. Implementation of modular **spatio-temporal** cleaning routines, parameterizable analytical visualizations (heatmaps, histograms, comparisons across temporal resolutions) and generalizable methods for user **classification** and **statistical validation**.

title: ETL y digitalización de documentos con OCR
description: Diseñé e implementé un **proceso ETL** para extraer y digitalizar información desde **documentos PDF** de entrevistas de trabajo, utilizando **OCR (Pytesseract)** y procesamiento de imágenes (**Pillow**), generalizando la solución para cualquier PDF que contuviera tablas. Desarrollé rutinas automatizadas de **limpieza, mapeo y validación** de los datos extraídos, integrando la información directamente en el flujo de validación de candidatos. Reduje el tiempo de procesamiento del histórico completo de **horas a minutos** (equivalente a segundos por documento individual), mejorando significativamente la eficiencia y trazabilidad del proceso.

title: Convolutional neural network for black hole images
description: Design, training and comparison of **convolutional network** architectures for feature extraction from black hole images, identifying key regions such as the ISCO and the photon sphere through **activation maps**. Included preprocessing and validation of physical data, **hyperparameter tuning** and cross-validation to optimize the model's predictive power. Results published in the eSPECTRA journal (Universidad Nacional de Colombia).

title: Climate GEO-Hackathon — 1st place
description: **First place** in an institutional hackathon at Universidad Nacional de Colombia, presenting an **analysis of trends**, periodicity and correlation in climate **data series** using **Fourier methods**, **regression models** and hypothesis testing.

title: NASA International Space Apps Challenge — 4th globally
description: Fourth place and a global nomination in the **NASA** hackathon, developing a pygame application capable of identifying seismic events in real time through a modified **STA/LTA** algorithm, reaching **96%** accuracy.
